title: R2 Component Decision Record (§1.2 / §1.3 d-stage; §1.4 legacy under v1.5)
description: Schema for runs/_r2_component_decisions.json. Consumed by phase_R2.md report-builder + runs/_r2_verification.json. **v1.5 (2026-05-10)**: R2-blocking component set reduced to {copy_paste_class_balanced_loss, hard_negative_mining} per pre-r2 kickoff checklist v1.5 §1 hot-path; map_prior_gating retained in enum as **legacy** (additional_components_plan v1.1 §零 deferred → R3+) and is **NOT** R2-close-blocking — verifiers MUST treat absence of map_prior_gating record as VALID at R2 close (do not raise missing-component error), and presence of a map_prior_gating record at R2 close MUST trigger non-fatal warning + carry-forward registration to §4.2 (item_id='map_prior_gate_§五'). Writers MUST call scripts/_r2_schema_utils.py::validate_and_enforce(records, schema_path, unique_keys=['component']) before persisting; verifiers MUST call the same gate before accepting. UNIQUENESS_KEYS mapping in _r2_schema_utils declares the canonical key set.

component.description: Closed enum. v1.5 R2 hot path = {copy_paste_class_balanced_loss, hard_negative_mining}; map_prior_gating retained as legacy enum value for backward compat with v1.4 fixtures, but flagged non-R2-close-blocking (additional_components_plan v1.1 §零 DEFERRED → R3+; pre-r2 kickoff §3.8). Adding a new component requires schema bump.

outcome.description: deploy = ship in R2 final pipeline. defer = component scaffolded but execution moved to later round (must populate next_round_action). drop = component abandoned for the R2 timeline (must populate next_round_action with carry-forward target).

reason.description: Free-text rationale. Empty string allowed when outcome=deploy (rationale lives in the report). On non-deploy outcomes, conditional rule below requires minLength >= 1 — silent drops not permitted.

anyOf.description: Repo-relative POSIX path. Forbids: absolute Unix (^/), Windows drive prefix (^[A-Za-z]:), leading current-dir (^./), backslashes, double slashes (//), '.' as any path segment (interior or trailing — e.g. 'runs/./x.json' or 'runs/.'), '..' segments (parent-relative), trailing slash (e.g. 'runs/' or 'runs/x/'), and whitespace (forbids prose-disguised-as-path smuggling). Hidden files with leading dot in the name (e.g. 'runs/.hidden') remain allowed because the segment is not exactly '.'. Empty string rejected via [^\s]+. Path canonicalization is the writer's responsibility — multiple spellings for the same artifact must NOT both be written.

blocking_artifacts.description: Array of references (path|sha256) to artifacts that document or block this decision (e.g. ablation result JSON, frozen manifest hashes, conflictor transcripts). Free-text prose disallowed by element-level oneOf so reviewers cannot smuggle un-anchored claims.

next_round_action.description: Free-text. Empty string allowed only when outcome=deploy. On non-deploy outcomes, conditional below requires minLength >= 1 (e.g. 'R3 hard-neg pool re-mining after on-vehicle replay'). Used by §4.2 carry-forward registration (_r2_carry_forward.json next_entrypoint feeds from this).

branch.description: Map-prior-only field. live = real-time GPS+map service available (5/12 GPS topic decision affirmative). replay_only = fallback because GPS topic missed deadline. Required only for component=map_prior_gating; ignored elsewhere (additionalProperties=false would reject branch on non-map-prior, but the conditional rule below makes it explicit).
